steps.title: Use the final sentence
steps.content: The text says some historians suggest that Maya mathematicians inherited the use of zero from the Olmec civilization. Inherited means they received or acquired it from that earlier civilization.

steps.title: Reject unsupported ideas
steps.content: B invents a comparison between historians and mathematicians, C invents secrecy, and D reverses the direction by suggesting the Maya spread their writing system to others. The answer is A.
